routing.rule: LVGL/UI code runs on Claw Panel; non-UI Lua runs in ESP Claw service.

screen.rule: Claw Panel visible area is 320x240 pixels. Keep every object, canvas, game board, and animation path within x=0..319 and y=0..239.
screen.layout: Before drawing grids/games, compute cols*cell_size and rows*cell_size plus margins so they fit inside 320x240. Do not use oversized boards such as 10x20 cells at 18px tall.
screen.canvas: Main canvas should usually be 320x240 or smaller. Avoid drawing a large filled rectangle after cells because it can cover the board; draw borders with lines or thin rectangles.

serialization.json: Do not use require("json") or require("sjson") in lua_run code; those modules are not loadable by require in this environment. For small JSON output, build the string with string.format/table.concat.

timer.preferred: local timer = add_timer(tmr.create()); timer:alarm(ms, tmr.ALARM_AUTO, cb)

lvgl.colors: Use 0xRRGGBB numbers directly; lv_color_hex is not available.
lvgl.line_points: lv_line_set_points keeps the point array; store points in a persistent table and mutate it. Do not pass an inline {...} table.
lvgl.visibility: For visible LVGL objects, setting bg_color is not enough; also call lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(obj,255,0). Balls, dots, background blocks, and panels may be transparent without bg_opa.

canvas.thick_lines: Draw several offset lines or use lv_line with style_line_width.
